name: healthcare_sensor_fusion_upgrade_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare sensor fusion upgrade stonehaven lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Ansel Navarro
agents.identity: I am Ansel Navarro, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Mei Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Mei Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Ansel Navarro must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Ansel Navarro do?
